topic: narrow scope - 3 candidate paradigms only with strong novelty falsifier focus — meta-design ω-cycle: raw 46-134 expanded design-strategy family (51 entries / 43 phases) 위에서 BREADTH 보다 DEPTH 우선으로 N=3 후보 paradigm 만 선정, 각각의 raw 117 5-check 의 sub-rule (5) novelty-falsifier 를 algebraic/structural-mismatch 의 DETERMINISTIC 검사로 강화. 8-paradigm 광역 enumeration cycle (sibling witness 2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-134-with-r1-r8-absorbed-n_omega_cycle.json) 의 quality dual: 3 후보 paradigm 만 골라 각각의 novelty-falsifier 가 (a) 어떤 existing raw 와의 algebraic/structural mismatch 인가, (b) 그 mismatch 가 field-addition 또는 slug-suffix 로 흡수 불가능 (deterministic test), (c) 어떤 raw set 이 false-positive 후보였는지 명시 — 의 3-tuple 로 strong-form 검증.
raw_8_compliance: PASS — design-only cycle. NO new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. NO .raw / .own / .roadmap / tool/*.hexa edits. Only this .json witness lands.
carry_forward_origin: ω-cycle 2026-04-27 8-paradigm sibling witness /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick/2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-134-with-r1-r8-absorbed-n_omega_cycle.json (8 candidate S-paradigms with raw 117 5-check + raw 126 4-field). 본 cycle 은 그 8 중 BREADTH 보다 DEPTH 우선 — N=3 만 선정 + 각 paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier (raw 117 sub-rule 5) 를 algebraic/structural-mismatch deterministic 검사로 강화. quality dual 가 sibling witness 의 quantity gate 를 보완.
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY. Inputs: raw 46-134 design-strategy family (51 entries) + sibling 8-paradigm witness 의 S-paradigm pool. Outputs: this witness JSON 의 (a) N=3 narrow paradigm 선정 (P1/P2/P3 = quantum-amplitude / type-theory / do-calculus, sibling 의 S6/S2/S7 — 가장 강한 algebraic/structural mismatch), (b) 각 paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier strength test (algebraic-mismatch + non-absorbability + false-positive-set), (c) cross-paradigm non-overlap witness (3C2=3 pair structure-mismatch). NO new raw/own registration, NO tool/*.hexa edit, NO atlas shard edit, NO commit.

intake.topic_summary: raw 46-134 family (51 entries) 위에서 N=3 narrow paradigm 선정. 후보 도출 source = sibling 8-paradigm witness 의 S1-S8 pool. 선정 기준 = (a) 가장 강한 algebraic/structural mismatch — field-addition 또는 slug-suffix 로 absorb 불가, (b) 가장 명확한 false-positive ruling-out (어떤 existing raw 가 false-positive 후보였는지 명시), (c) 가장 deterministic 한 novelty 검사 (LLM judge 우회 가능). 선정: P1 = design-strategy-quantum-amplitude-grover-feynman (sibling S6) — complex non-commutative amplitude ring vs real commutative probability ring 의 algebraic 구조 mismatch (raw 113 bayesian 흡수 불가 — interference 항 |α+β|²≠|α|²+|β|²). P2 = design-strategy-type-theory-curry-howard-proof-as-program (sibling S2) — syntactic derivation system (lambda calculus + dependent types) vs semantic categorical structure (raw 132 operadic) 영역 mismatch (raw 132 흡수 불가 — semantic universe vs syntactic proof tree). P3 = design-strategy-causal-do-calculus-instrumental-variable (sibling S7) — interventional do(X) probability vs observational conditional probability 의 algebraic mismatch (raw 120 counterfactual-twin 흡수 불가 — 3 Pearl rules 의 do-operator 가 conditional 과 distinct symbol class).

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 motif = 'tier1-recommendation OPT B' — 즉 OPTION B 채택 의 'narrow alternative selection' meta-pattern (config-ts-port-roi 에서 OPT_B 가 conservative narrow scope 였음). 본 cycle 의 reframe: 8-paradigm shotgun 보다 3-paradigm narrow OPT-B 선택 — paradigm count 의 conservative narrowing = sibling cycle 의 OPT-A breadth 와 OPT-B depth 의 dual. axis_a 에서 N=3 narrow 명시; axis_b 에서 novelty-falsifier 의 deterministic strength test 가 narrow scope 의 quality compensation.

KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 정직 라벨.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: narrow-scope-paradigm-count-eq-3
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.candidate_paradigms[] length == 3 (not >=3 — exactly 3 narrow scope 강제). 각 entry 6 필드 (id, genus_name, novel_contribution_vs_46_134_family, primary_mechanism, primary_existing_raw_anchor, raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration) non-empty. ≠3 또는 entry 1개라도 필드 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_a.candidate_paradigms[] length === 3 + 각 entry 6 필드 non-empty
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic JSON length + field-presence (raw 53 schema_validate; raw 73 deterministic verifier)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: candidate_paradigms.length === 3 AND all 6 fields non-empty per entry

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-paradigm-novelty-falsifier-algebraic-structural-mismatch
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 각 paradigm 의 novelty_falsifier_strong[] 객체에 (a) algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind (string — 'commutative-vs-noncommutative-ring' / 'real-vs-complex-field' / 'observational-vs-interventional-calculus' / 'syntactic-vs-semantic-universe' 등 typed enum), (b) closest_existing_raw_id (int — false-positive 후보), (c) deterministic_mismatch_test (string — 'does P(A∪B) = P(A)+P(B)−P(A∩B) 위반 검사' 같은 OS-level 또는 schema-level 검증 절차), (d) absorption_test_negative_result (string — '해당 mismatch 는 raw N field-addition 또는 slug-suffix 로 흡수 불가능, 이유는 ...') — 4 sub-key 모두 채움. <4 sub-key 또는 missing = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: all 3 paradigms have novelty_falsifier_strong 4 sub-keys non-empty

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-paradigm-cites-ge-2-cognitive-frameworks-AND-ge-3-realization-channels
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw 117 5-check sub-rule (2)+(3) 충족 — cognitive_frameworks_cited[] >= 2 distinct disciplines AND realization_channels[] >= 3 distinct mechanisms (no vendor variation). <2 또는 <3 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: 각 candidate_paradigms[i] 의 frameworks length >=2 AND channels length >=3

falsifiers_preregistered.name: each-paradigm-passes-raw-117-5check-AND-raw-126-stability-4-field
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 각 paradigm 이 raw 117 5-check 모두 PASS (genus-naming + ≥2 frameworks + ≥3 channels + counter-example + novelty-falsifier) AND raw 126 self-host-stability 4-field 선언 (k_step_byte_eq_witness, divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded, n_step_general_bound, fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification). 5/5 + 4/4 = 9/9 모두 PASS 아니면 entry FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema field + slug-suffix allowlist (raw 53 set_membership) + 4-field non-empty

falsifiers_preregistered.name: cross-paradigm-pairwise-non-overlap-3-pairs-witness
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_c.pairwise_non_overlap[] length == 3 (= 3C2). 각 pair 4 필드 (pair_id, paradigm_a, paradigm_b, structural_mismatch_witness) non-empty + 각 mismatch_witness 가 algebraic 또는 structural typed enum. <3 또는 entry 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_c.pairwise_non_overlap[] length === 3 + 각 entry 4 필드 non-empty + structural_mismatch_witness in typed enum
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: pairwise_non_overlap.length === 3 AND all 4 fields per entry AND mismatch in typed enum

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-triad-fields-met
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: honesty_triad 의 (a) promotion_counter (int) + (b) write_barrier (str — emit/no-emit 명시) + (c) no_fabrication_evidence[] (≥4 file:line citation) 3 필드 모두 non-empty. <4 citation 또는 missing = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: honesty_triad has promotion_counter (int>=0), write_barrier non-empty, no_fabrication_evidence[] length >= 4
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: 3 keys + counter int + barrier non-empty + evidence length >= 4

falsifiers_preregistered.name: design-only-no-implementation-write-barrier
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw_8_compliance starts 'PASS' AND write_barrier mentions 'no .raw/.own/.roadmap edits' AND policy_mode == 'READ-ONLY'. 위반 시 FAIL.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: K-ge-3-orthogonal-axes-correlation-lt-0_7
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: K>=3 axes (narrow-3-paradigm-enumeration / novelty-falsifier-strength-test / cross-paradigm-non-overlap-witness) + pairwise correlation < 0.7 + correlation_estimate 명시. K<3 또는 corr>=0.7 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: fan_out has axis_a, axis_b, axis_c with correlation_estimate string + correlation_lt_0_7: true + K>=3
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: K>=3 AND correlation_lt_0_7==true AND correlation_estimate non-empty

axis_a.rationale: raw 46-134 family 위 N=3 narrow paradigm enumeration. axis_a 는 'WHICH 3 paradigms have strongest novelty' — 'HOW STRONG is each novelty-falsifier' (axis_b) 와 'whether the 3 are mutually non-overlapping' (axis_c) 와 직교. α envelope OPT_B narrow-alternative motif 와 직접 align (8 → 3 narrowing).

candidate_paradigms.novel_contribution_vs_46_134_family: raw 113 bayesian 는 CLASSICAL real-valued probability (additive on disjoint events: P(A∪B)=P(A)+P(B) for disjoint). P1 은 QUANTUM AMPLITUDE — probability = |amplitude|² where amplitude ∈ ℂ; |α+β|² ≠ |α|²+|β|² 일반 (interference cross-term 2Re(αβ̄)); algebraic ring 자체 commutative real → non-commutative complex 로 변경. raw 123 active-info-acquisition 의 EIG 는 classical Shannon — Holevo bound (quantum mutual info) 와 분리. raw 121 edge-of-chaos classical dynamical → quantum chaos OTOC 별개.
candidate_paradigms.primary_mechanism: Hilbert space H = ℂ^N; state |ψ⟩=Σα_i|i⟩, ‖ψ‖²=1; observable Hermitian A; measurement p(i)=|⟨i|ψ⟩|²; unitary U evolution; Grover oracle amplification (rotation 2θ per iteration, √N total); amplitude estimation Brassard-Hoyer-Mosca; Feynman path integral K=∫Dx exp(iS[x]/ℏ); interference term 2Re(αβ̄) 가 classical 재현 불가능 algebraic obstruction.
candidate_paradigms.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 113 (bayesian — classical real prob, complex amplitude 부재) + raw 123 (active-info-acq — classical EIG, Holevo 부재) + raw 121 (edge-of-chaos — classical Lyapunov, OTOC quantum chaos 부재)
candidate_paradigms.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=NO (quantum measurement intrinsically stochastic per measurement); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (Grover-amplitude-amplification angle invariance selftest k=2: √N rotation 이 always 2θ); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=NO (unitary evolution preserves norm = 1); n_step_general_bound=O(√N) Grover, O(N²) full state; fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=oscillation (Grover 은 rotation periodic) OR fixpoint-on-eigenstate (eigenstate of unitary up to phase fixpoint)
realization_channels: Grover-style amplitude amplification with classical oracle wrapper
quantum walk analogue of classical random walk
Feynman path-integral Monte Carlo for amplitude sum
candidate_paradigms.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design where superposition / interference 무관 (purely classical probabilistic — quantum overhead infeasible without quantum hardware)

novelty_falsifier_strong.deterministic_mismatch_test: given two events A,B with amplitudes α,β: classical raw 113 는 P(A∪B)=P(A)+P(B)−P(A∩B) 만족; P1 은 |α+β|² = |α|²+|β|²+2Re(αβ̄) 로 cross-term 2Re(αβ̄) ≠ 0 (interference). schema-level test: paradigm 등록 시 'amplitude_addition_law' 필드 존재 여부 + interference_term_nonzero_witness 검증. raw 113 'evidence_combiner' 에 'amplitude_squared' field 추가만으로는 cross-term 표현 불가 — additive law 자체가 다름.
novelty_falsifier_strong.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 113 의 'evidence_combiner' field 를 'amplitude_squared' 로 추가해도 commutative real ring 의 prior×likelihood=posterior multiplicative algebra 가 보존됨 — non-commutative complex ring 의 [A,B]=AB−BA≠0 을 ring axiom 차원에서 흡수 불가. slug-suffix 'bayesian-quantum' 으로 species 화 시도 시 raw 106 genus mandate 위반 (cognitive framework 가 quantum mechanics 자체 — Feynman/Dirac/Grover 가 Bayes 위에 species 가 아닌 distinct genus). 따라서 P1 은 raw 113 absorb 불가.

candidate_paradigms.novel_contribution_vs_46_134_family: raw 132 operadic-higher-cat 는 OBJECT-MORPHISM SEMANTIC categorical structure (operad of multi-input compositions). P2 는 SYNTACTIC PROOF DERIVATION — 각 design claim φ → type τ_φ; proof of φ → term t : τ_φ; β/η-reduction normal form; intuitionistic logic = simply-typed lambda; first-order = MLTT Π/Σ types; HoTT univalence axiom 로 raw 134 quotient canonical-form 을 propositional equality 로 강화. raw 117 5-check 가 schema-level — formal type encoding 부재.
candidate_paradigms.primary_mechanism: design claim φ → type τ_φ; proof of φ → term t : τ_φ; β/η-reduction 로 normal form; intuitionistic logic = simply-typed lambda; first-order = MLTT Π/Σ types; HoTT type-as-space, equality-as-path, univalence (equivalent types are propositionally equal); proof-checker (Coq/Agda/Lean) 가 design 검증; strong normalization theorem (Howard-Tait) 보장.
candidate_paradigms.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 132 (operadic — categorical SEMANTIC, syntactic proof tree 부재) + raw 117 (5-check meta — natural-language schema, formal type encoding 부재) + raw 134 (quotient canonical — equivalence relation, propositional equality 부재)
candidate_paradigms.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (proof normal form deterministic — type-checking reproducible byte-eq via proof script hash); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (proof-checker selftest k=2: 동일 design 의 type-derivation 두 번 → 동일 normal form); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=NO (well-typed program terminates; non-terminating = system contradiction); n_step_general_bound=O(strong-normalization theorem bound for MLTT — Howard-Tait); fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (β/η-normal form unique up to α-equivalence)
realization_channels: explicit MLTT type encoding of design claim with Π/Σ types
Coq/Agda/Lean proof script with mechanical type-checker
HoTT univalence-based equivalence-as-equality for canonical form
extracted certified executable from proof term (program extraction)
candidate_paradigms.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with informal natural-language only (no formal logic specification — type encoding overhead infeasible) OR design with non-terminating/partial functions (out of MLTT scope)

novelty_falsifier_strong.deterministic_mismatch_test: given a design claim φ: raw 132 operadic 는 semantic universe 의 object/morphism/composition diagram 검증 (string-diagram or Pasting-diagram); P2 는 syntactic universe 의 proof tree leaf-to-root reduction (term inference + type checking). schema-level test: paradigm 등록 시 'proof_term' 필드 + 'normal_form_hash' 필드 존재 여부 검증; operadic 의 'composition_law' 필드만으로는 type-checker reduction trace 표현 불가. Curry-Howard 가 두 영역을 BRIDGE 하나, bridge 자체가 distinct genus 임을 증명.
novelty_falsifier_strong.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 132 의 'composition_law' field 에 'type_theoretic_term' 추가해도 semantic categorical structure 가 syntactic proof-derivation tree 의 reduction sequence 를 표현 불가 — categorical functor F: C→D 는 object 차원, lambda β-reduction 은 term 차원. slug-suffix 'operadic-type-theoretic' 시도 시 raw 106 genus mandate 위반 (Martin-Löf MLTT / Coq / HoTT 가 distinct cognitive framework — Voevodsky/Coquand/Howard 가 operad 위 species 아닌 distinct genus). 따라서 P2 는 raw 132 absorb 불가.

candidate_paradigms.novel_contribution_vs_46_134_family: raw 120 counterfactual-causal-twin 은 SCM-level deterministic-twin trace (intervention X 를 안 했을 때의 outcome 시뮬레이션). P3 는 do-calculus ALGEBRAIC IDENTIFICATION — Pearl 3 rules (insertion/deletion of observation, action/observation exchange, insertion/deletion of action) 로 P(Y|do(X)) 를 observational P(Y|X,Z) 로 reduce; do(X) 는 conditional 과 distinct symbol class (interventional algebra); IV identification (Z→X→Y, Z⫫U_Y); IC algorithm structure learning. raw 110 ablation 의 destructive-removal 과 dual.
candidate_paradigms.primary_mechanism: causal DAG G; intervention do(X=x); query P(Y|do(X)); rule 1: P(Y|do(X), Z, W) = P(Y|do(X), W) if Y ⫫ Z | X,W in G_X̄; rule 2: P(Y|do(X), Z) = P(Y|X, Z) if Y ⫫ X | Z in G_X̄_Z; rule 3: P(Y|do(X)) = P(Y) if Y ⫫ X in G_X̄(W); IV: Z→X→Y with Z⫫U_Y; IC algorithm PC + FCI for causal graph from observational data; Tian-Pearl ID algorithm complete identifiability check.
candidate_paradigms.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 120 (counterfactual-twin — SCM trace, do-calculus algebraic reduction 부재) + raw 110 (ablation — counterfactual via removal, identification calculus 부재) + raw 113 (bayesian — observational only, intervention 부재)
candidate_paradigms.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (do-calculus rule application deterministic — same DAG + same query = byte-eq reduced expression); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (rule-application convergence selftest k=3: 3 rules 적용 후 identifiable iff no front-door/back-door violation); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=allowed-non-identifiable (some interventional queries 는 observational data 만으로 identifiable 안 됨 — explicit non-identifiability declaration); n_step_general_bound=O(graph-size · rule-count) for ID algorithm complete (Tian-Pearl); fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (reduced expression 후 더 이상 do-operation 없으면 fixpoint)
cognitive_frameworks_cited: structural causal model SCM (Pearl 2000 Causality book)
realization_channels: do-calculus 3-rule reduction engine on causal DAG
PC algorithm for skeleton + orientation from observational data
Tian-Pearl ID algorithm complete identifiability check
candidate_paradigms.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with no causal DAG structure (purely associational — do-operator undefined) OR design with no clear distinction between observation and intervention

novelty_falsifier_strong.deterministic_mismatch_test: given a causal DAG G + query Q: raw 120 SCM-twin 는 'set X to x in SCM, simulate, observe Y' (deterministic SCM trace); P3 do-calculus 는 'reduce P(Y|do(X)) symbolically to observational P(Y|X,Z) via 3 rules' (algebraic reduction). schema-level test: paradigm 등록 시 'do_calculus_rule_trace' 필드 (rule sequence 1-2-3 application log) + 'identifiability_verdict' 필드 (identifiable | non-identifiable) 존재 여부 검증; SCM-twin 의 'simulated_outcome' 필드만으로는 algebraic reduction trace 표현 불가. P(Y|do(X)) 와 P(Y|X) 가 distinct symbol class (do-operator 는 conditional 과 다른 algebra) — observational-only 로는 do-query 답 추론 불가능 한 example 존재 (e.g., back-door 없는 unidentifiable case).
novelty_falsifier_strong.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 120 의 'counterfactual_trace' field 에 'do_operator_applied' 추가해도 SCM-level forward simulation 만 가능 — Pearl 3 rules 의 algebraic reduction (back-door / front-door / IV criterion) 의 symbolic manipulation 표현 불가; SCM 은 model-given assumed 후 simulation, do-calculus 는 graph-theoretic identification (model 미지의 경우에도 graph 만으로 reduction 가능). slug-suffix 'counterfactual-do-calculus' 시도 시 raw 106 genus mandate 위반 (Pearl do-calculus / Wright IV / Spirtes-Glymour-Scheines IC 가 distinct cognitive framework — counterfactual 위 species 아닌 distinct genus algebra). 따라서 P3 는 raw 120 absorb 불가.

axis_a.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_a × axis_b ≈ 0.45 (paradigm enumeration 과 novelty-falsifier strength 가 약 correlated — paradigm 본문에 falsifier 포함되어 약하게 의존하나 strength 의 deterministic 검사 자체는 별도 axis)

axis_b.rationale: 각 paradigm 의 raw 117 sub-rule (5) novelty-falsifier 를 단순 prose 가 아닌 (a) algebraic/structural mismatch typed enum, (b) closest existing raw id (false-positive 후보), (c) deterministic mismatch test (schema/OS-level 검사 절차), (d) absorption test negative result (왜 absorb 불가능한지) 의 4-tuple 로 strong-form 명시. raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 (LLM judge 우회 가능). axis_b 는 'HOW STRONG is each novelty-falsifier' — axis_a 의 paradigm 자체와 axis_c 의 cross-overlap 검증과 직교.

raw_117_sub_1_genus_naming.rationale: no -via/-with/-vendor species suffix; -grover-feynman 는 historical-figure naming (cognitive-framework 의 anchor 인물 이름, raw 106 ban list 의 -via/-with/-api/-sdk/-tool/-cli/-daemon/-script 와 distinct). cognitive-framework 의 founding figure 명명 (Grover 1996 algorithm + Feynman 1948 path integral) 은 genus-level 명명 의 학문 anchor 식별자.

raw_117_sub_4_counter_example.counter_example_summary: purely classical probabilistic (superposition/interference 무관) → quantum overhead 무익

raw_117_sub_5_novelty_falsifier_strong.strength_grade: STRONG (algebraic ring mismatch — commutative real → non-commutative complex; deterministic interference-cross-term test; raw 113 absorption 불가능 증명)

raw_117_sub_1_genus_naming.rationale: no -via/-with/-vendor species suffix; -curry-howard 는 historical-figure (Curry 1934 + Howard 1980) anchor; -proof-as-program 는 sub-paradigm-name (genus-level identifier — Curry-Howard correspondence 자체).

raw_117_sub_4_counter_example.counter_example_summary: informal natural-language only design OR non-terminating/partial functions (MLTT scope 외)

raw_117_sub_5_novelty_falsifier_strong.strength_grade: STRONG (syntactic vs semantic universe mismatch — proof tree term-level reduction vs categorical object/morphism diagram; deterministic normal-form-hash test; raw 132 absorption 불가능 증명)

raw_117_sub_1_genus_naming.rationale: no -via/-with/-vendor species suffix; -do-calculus 는 algebraic-system anchor (Pearl 3 rules) + -instrumental-variable 는 second cognitive-framework anchor (Wright 1928 IV); 두 framework 가 모두 genus-level 의 algebraic-identification anchor.

raw_117_sub_4_counter_example.counter_example_summary: no causal DAG (purely associational) OR no observation/intervention distinction

raw_117_sub_5_novelty_falsifier_strong.strength_grade: STRONG (observational vs interventional symbol class mismatch — P(Y|X) vs P(Y|do(X)) distinct algebra; deterministic do-calculus rule trace test + identifiability verdict; raw 120 absorption 불가능 증명)

axis_b.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_b × axis_a ≈ 0.45 (novelty-falsifier strength 가 paradigm 본문에 포함되나 strength 의 deterministic 검사 procedure 는 separate). axis_b × axis_c ≈ 0.35 (novelty-falsifier 는 paradigm 단일 entry, cross-overlap 은 pairwise — 구조적 distinct).

axis_c.rationale: narrow scope (N=3) 가 paradigm 의 mutual non-overlap 을 explicitly 증명할 책임 짐 — pairwise 3C2=3 pair 모두 structural mismatch witness 명시. 'P1 ↔ P2: complex amplitude algebra vs lambda-calculus type theory — 영역 mismatch (probabilistic vs logical)'; 'P1 ↔ P3: complex amplitude vs interventional algebra — 영역 mismatch (quantum prob vs causal algebra)'; 'P2 ↔ P3: syntactic proof system vs causal graph reduction — 영역 mismatch (logical vs causal)'. axis_c 는 'are the 3 paradigms truly non-overlapping' — axis_a (which 3) 와 axis_b (each strong) 와 직교. β bias mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path.

pairwise_non_overlap.structural_mismatch_witness: probabilistic-amplitude-domain-vs-logical-derivation-domain (typed enum: cross-domain) — P1 은 measurement-theoretic complex amplitude ring 위 stochastic outcome; P2 는 type-theoretic deterministic proof tree reduction. 두 paradigm 의 PRIMARY object 가 distinct (state vector |ψ⟩ ∈ ℂ^N vs term t : τ_φ); deterministic-reproducibility 도 mismatch (P1 stochastic measurement, P2 byte-eq normal form). overlap 은 quantum proof assistants (Quipper, Q#) 처럼 후속 IM cross-paradigm 에서 emerge 가능하나 본 cycle scope 외. axis_c entry verdict = NON_OVERLAP.

quantum-amplitude-algebra-vs-causal-intervention-algebra (typed enum: distinct-algebraic-system) — P1 은 unitary evolution + measurement collapse 의 quantum dynamics; P3 는 SCM/DAG 의 do-operator algebraic reduction. 두 paradigm 의 PRIMARY symbol class 가 distinct (|ψ⟩ + Hermitian observables vs P(Y|do(X)) + Pearl 3 rules); 두 algebra 모두 'commutative real ring' 외부이나 서로 다른 방향 (quantum: non-commutative complex / causal: interventional symbol). overlap 은 quantum causal inference 후속 paradigm 에서 emerge 가능 (e.g., quantum Bayesian networks) 하나 본 cycle scope 외. axis_c entry verdict = NON_OVERLAP.

syntactic-proof-system-vs-causal-graph-reduction (typed enum: cross-domain) — P2 는 lambda-calculus + dependent types 의 syntactic derivation tree (β/η-reduction); P3 는 causal DAG 의 graph-theoretic 3-rule reduction (back-door/front-door/IV criterion). 두 paradigm 의 PRIMARY structure 가 distinct (term-tree vs graph-DAG); reduction semantic 도 distinct (term-rewriting vs graph-surgery). overlap 은 causal type theory (Cartwright 2007) 후속 cross-paradigm 에서 emerge 가능하나 본 cycle scope 외. axis_c entry verdict = NON_OVERLAP.

axis_c.correlation_with_other_axes_estimate: axis_c × axis_a ≈ 0.30 (axis_c 의 pairwise 검증은 axis_a paradigm 본문 위에서 구조 분석 — paradigm-set 결정 후 별도). axis_c × axis_b ≈ 0.35 (cross-overlap 분석과 each-strong novelty-falsifier 가 모두 algebraic mismatch typed enum 사용 — 어휘 공유).

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a×b≈0.45 / axis_a×c≈0.30 / axis_b×c≈0.35 — all pairwise < 0.7 (raw 48 multi-axis orthogonal mandate 충족). axis_a 는 'WHICH 3 paradigms', axis_b 는 'HOW STRONG each novelty-falsifier (deterministic test procedure)', axis_c 는 'whether the 3 are mutually non-overlapping (pairwise mismatch witness)'.

axes_surfaced.name: narrow scope N=3 paradigm enumeration — quality dual of 8-paradigm sibling cycle
options_considered: A. 'Re-emit all 8 S-paradigms from sibling 8-paradigm witness without narrowing' (rejected: 본 cycle topic 'narrow scope - 3 candidate paradigms only' 명시적; quality dual 책임 수행 안 됨)
B. 'Pick random 3 of 8 sibling paradigms (no quality criterion)' (rejected: random selection 은 'strong novelty falsifier focus' 의 quality-gate 무시; α envelope OPT_B narrow-conservative motif 와 모순)

C. 'Pick 3 paradigms with STRONGEST algebraic/structural mismatch (P1 quantum-amplitude / P2 type-theory / P3 do-calculus) — 각각 (a) algebraic ring 자체가 다른 case (P1 complex non-commutative), (b) syntactic vs semantic universe (P2), (c) observational vs interventional algebra (P3) — sibling 의 S6/S2/S7 에 대응; 8 후보 중 가장 명확한 false-positive ruling-out + deterministic mismatch test 가능' (chosen: F1 N=3 narrow + F2 strong novelty falsifier 4-tuple + α OPT_B narrow motif 정렬)

D. 'Pick 3 paradigms with WEAKEST algebraic mismatch — 가장 어려운 case 검증' (rejected: weakest 검증은 falsifier-strength quality 와 모순 — strong-form 명시 책임 못함; 8 후보 중 weakest 는 sibling 의 S1 ergodic / S3 info-geometry / S4 LDP — raw 121 / raw 111 / raw 113 와 boundary 가까움 — narrow scope 의 'strong novelty' 원칙 위반)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — P1 quantum-amplitude / P2 type-theory / P3 do-calculus (sibling S6/S2/S7) 선정. 각 paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier 를 algebraic/structural-mismatch typed enum + closest existing raw id + deterministic mismatch test + absorption test negative result 의 4-tuple 로 strong-form 명시.
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (OPT_B narrow-alternative motif) 가 axis_a narrow-scope 동기화. β byte 224 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path bias (cross-overlap 우선). γ envelope (arxiv-realtime-bridge novelty-paper motif) → 각 paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier arxiv-DOI lineage 검증 책임. F2 strong novelty falsifier 4-tuple gate 가 quality compensation.

axes_surfaced.name: raw 117 sub-rule (5) novelty-falsifier 를 algebraic/structural mismatch deterministic test 로 강화
options_considered: A. 'novelty-falsifier 를 prose 만으로 명시 (sibling cycle 의 일반 form)' (rejected: 본 cycle topic 'strong novelty falsifier focus' 명시; prose-only 는 raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 위반)
B. 'LLM judge 로 novelty 평가' (rejected: raw 53 'LLM-judge ban' — schema-level deterministic 검사 강제)

C. '4-tuple typed novelty-falsifier — (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum, closest_existing_raw_id int, deterministic_mismatch_test str procedure, absorption_test_negative_result str) — schema-level 검증 가능' (chosen: F2 mandate 충족; raw 53 deterministic verifier + raw 73 verify-then-seal 정신 일치)
D. '8+ field tuple — 더 많은 field 로 더 강한 검증' (rejected: 4-tuple 가 minimum sufficient quality; over-engineering 은 carry-forward 부담; F2 4 sub-key strict 책임)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 4-tuple typed novelty-falsifier_strong (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind enum / closest_existing_raw_id int / deterministic_mismatch_test str / absorption_test_negative_result str). 각 paradigm 의 novelty-falsifier 가 schema-level 검증 가능.
axes_surfaced.rationale: raw 53 deterministic verifier 정신 — LLM judge 우회 (typed enum + int id + procedure str). raw 73 verify-then-seal — 등록 시점 schema 검증 가능 (verify-then-seal 가 train-then-verify 의 dual). γ arxiv-bridge 의 novelty-paper motif → closest_existing_raw_id 의 paper-DOI lineage cross-link.

axes_surfaced.name: 3 paradigms 의 pairwise (3C2=3 pair) structural-mismatch non-overlap witness
options_considered: A. 'cross-pair non-overlap 검증 안 함 (axis_c 생략)' (rejected: narrow scope 책임 — N=3 만 선정 시 '3 가 정말 distinct' 입증 책임 임; axis_c 가 narrow-scope quality 의 backbone)
B. '단순 prose declaration — 3 paradigms are distinct' (rejected: F5 mandate 4-필드 schema-level 명시 + typed enum 강제)
C. 'pairwise 3C2=3 pair 모두 4-필드 (pair_id, paradigm_a, paradigm_b, structural_mismatch_witness with typed enum) + verdict NON_OVERLAP' (chosen: F5 mandate 충족; β bias mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path)
D. 'all-vs-all matrix 3×3 (포함 self-pair P1×P1)' (rejected: self-pair 는 trivial non-overlap; pairwise upper-triangle 3 pair 가 minimum sufficient — F5 strict)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3 pairwise pair (Q1 P1×P2 / Q2 P1×P3 / Q3 P2×P3) 모두 4-필드 + verdict NON_OVERLAP + structural_mismatch_witness typed enum.
axes_surfaced.rationale: narrow scope quality compensation — N=3 narrow 의 mutual distinctness 가 강점이 되려면 명시적 cross-pair witness 필요. β byte 224 mod 3=2 → axis_c hot-path. typed enum {cross-domain, distinct-algebraic-system, ...} 가 schema-level 검증 가능 (LLM judge 우회).
